reviews.review_description: the game is still in devolopment so might not be that good at first but stuff will be added in future. The owner is really kind (Jay) and the mods are very active (me and some others) we are very excited to make a new community for cubrunners it will mean the world to us if you download it and give it a try! - Coke (mod)

developer_response.body: thanks so much this helps me so much

reviews.review_description: This game is a horror game that's victory scary.. also this game is still in development so dont hate the mods are active like me and others and the community I kind🙂
